title: bromus scoparius var. intermedius
intro: Bromus scoparius var. intermedius, also known as the lesser brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce inflammation, and prevent infection. The health benefits of lesser brome include its ability to support digestive health, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as a natural diuretic. In herbal preparations, lesser brome is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
